description: The first REAL-SHAPED plump store: a fictional game-mod localization toolchain (LocForge, for the invented game Rangers of Aethel) modeled on the messy FORM of a genuine over-grown agent memory — a markdown [Title](file.md) index over 9 topic files mixing Thai+English prose, [[wikilinks]], version chains with a superseded middle, ISO dates, absolute Windows/POSIX paths, and UPPER-CASE doctrine words. Muscle = versions, dates, wikilink/index-link targets, unique ids, config keys, one-line lesson kernels; several muscle needles carry composed Thai sara-am (U+0E33) and curly quotes so a decompose/re-encode scores as loss. Contains the hard FN-trap class: near-duplicate pairs differing by ONE load-bearing token (a version/magic, a NOT, a config-key rename, a threshold) where the fat twin is deletable filler and the muscle twin carries the differing token. Fat = superseded verbiage (its superseding fact survives as muscle), done point-in-time freeze/incident entries with no forward value, cross-file verbose restatements, a Thai restatement block, hedging padding, and one wholly-deletable scratch file (deleting it entails the gate-shown drop of its [Scratch — June 2026](scratch-2026-06.md) index link; its [[incidents]]/[[glossary-rules]] links survive elsewhere).

muscle.note: version chain — keeps every version token alive, incl the superseded-middle v1.0.2 that fat f01 references

the repack step is NOT idempotent

repack.parallel = false is the shipped default
